narrative:
Denmark Twp township has 503 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points.
